    🎯 Your Courses (Clean Structure)

    💻 Core Computer Science Courses
  • 1. 🌐 Computer Networks
    • Network layers (OSI / TCP-IP)
    • Protocols (HTTP, FTP, DNS)
    • Routing & Switching
    • Exam preparation & summaries
  • 2. 🧠 Operating Systems (OS)
    • Process Scheduling
    • Memory Management
    • File Systems
    • Deadlocks & Synchronization
  • 3. 🌍 Advanced Web Development (PHP)
    • Backend Development using PHP
    • Web Services & APIs
    • Database Integration (MySQL)
    • Full-stack concepts
  • 4. 🎨 Multimedia
    • Image / Video Compression
    • Audio Processing
    • Multimedia Systems
    • Fast Revision for exams
  • 5. 🏢 ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning)
    • Business Process Integration
    • ERP Systems (like SAP basics)
    • Real-world enterprise solutions
